functions.name: load_global_config
functions.signature: def load_global_config(path: str | None = None) -> dict
functions.description: 加载全局 config.toml，填充缺失默认值

functions.name: save_global_config
functions.signature: def save_global_config(config: dict, path: str | None = None) -> None
functions.description: 写入全局配置到 TOML 文件

functions.name: resolve_server
functions.signature: def resolve_server(server_ref: str, global_config: dict | None = None) -> dict
functions.description: 将 server 引用解析为连接详情（host/port/tls/password）

functions.name: ensure_server_in_global
functions.signature: def ensure_server_in_global(name: str, host: str, port: int, tls: bool, password: str = '', global_config: dict | None = None) -> dict
functions.description: 向全局配置添加 server 条目（如不存在）

functions.name: get_config_value
functions.description: 通过 dotted key 获取配置值

functions.name: set_config_value
functions.signature: def set_config_value(config: dict, dotted_key: str, value: str | int | bool | list) -> None
functions.description: 通过 dotted key 设置配置值（自动转换 bool）
